query:
SELECT
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS "total!",
            COUNT(*) FILTER (
                WHERE s.last_synced_at > now() - interval '1 hour'
            )::bigint AS "fresh!"
        FROM calendars c
        LEFT JOIN sync_state s ON s.calendar_id = c.id
        WHERE c.org_id = $1 AND c.user_id = $2 AND c.sync_enabled = true
